differentials.name: Lactation ◊  Breast involution after lactation takes 3 months
differentials.raw: Lactation ◊  Breast involution after lactation takes 3 months

differentials.name: Endocrine antihormonal therapy Antiestrogenic agents:   selective estrogen receptor modulators, aromatase inhibitors
differentials.raw: Endocrine antihormonal therapy Antiestrogenic agents:   selective estrogen receptor modulators, aromatase inhibitors

context: √  enhancement high during days 21-28 and days 1-6 after menstruation + low during days 7-20 Note:  NO impairment in cancer detection in lactating patients! Breast-feeding:   safe after contrast-enhanced MRI ← minute amounts of Gd in breast milk √  decrease in fibroglandular tissue → degree of BPE typically less than that in premenopausal women √  increase in BPE in amount + degree + distribution with great interindividual variations: ◊  Hormonal effect reverses after 30-60 days √  significant decrease in amount of fibroglandular tissue + cysts + BPE √  effect on BPE evident early in treatment
